0 - Xi 0 exploit
1 - Xi 0.1 small explore
2 - Xi 0.5medium explore
3 - Xi 20 higher Explore
4 - UCB k 0.1 exploit
5 - UCB k 5 balanced
6 - UCB k 10 medium explore
7 - UCB k 20 extreme Explore
